data.title: "Three Corners of Deception 2" Movie In the Making Announced
data.description: New Development to Expose Ongoing Judicial Corruption in Indiana Courts INDIANAPOLIS - As per the recent announcement on April 22, 2026, by Dr. Meleeka Clary-Ghosh, a sequel titled Three Corners of Deception 2, is currently under production. The initial installment, released in 2023, brought attention to the prevalent issues within the judicial system. This new project aims to delve further into the matter, shedding light on the corruption within Indiana courts. Specific details regarding the extent of corruption and key figures involved are expected to be revealed in the upcoming sequel. Stay updated as the narrative unfolds to uncover the truth behind this concerning issue.

data.title: Behrman Capital Acquires Metallizing Service Company
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Behrman Capital, a private equity firm located in New York, disclosed the successful acquisition of Metallizing Service Company Holdings (MSC), a prominent provider of specialized thermal engineering services. The transaction marks a significant milestone for Behrman, showcasing their continued growth and strategic investment initiatives in the market.

data.title: Spire announces sale of its Mississippi natural gas business to Delta Utilities for $75 million
data.description: A recent sale has allowed for a strategic refinement of geographical focus, with a shift towards larger regulated gas utilities. As a result, Spire Mississippi is now the primary focus, servicing around 18,000 customers with a network covering approximately 745 miles of distribution pipelines. The transaction is anticipated to be finalized in the first quarter of the fiscal year 2027.

data.title: CGI and SSAB expand their strategic IT partnership
data.description: CGI, a leading global IT and business consulting services firm, announced on April 22, 2026, that they will be expanding their partnership with SSAB, a steel company operating in Nordic and U.S. markets. Both companies trade under symbols GIB.A on the TSX and GIB on the NYSE. This agreement signifies a significant step for CGI as they solidify their position as a major player in the IT consulting industry.

data.title: DFI Expands Taiwan Manufacturing Capacity to Support Edge AI and Regulated Deployments
data.description: On April 22, 2026, in Taipei, it was reported that DFI, a renowned company in embedded and industrial computing solutions, revealed a strategic move to bolster its manufacturing capacity in Taiwan. This decision comes in response to the increasing demand for Edge AI, industrial automation, and various other industrial applications. This expansion signifies a significant investment in enhancing production capabilities to meet the growing market requirements.

data.title: Alterity Therapeutics Presents New Analysis of ATH434 Phase 2 Trial Data in Late Breaking Science Session of the American Academy of Neurology
data.description: ATH434 demonstrated a decrease in functional decline compared to a placebo at Week 52 based on the MuSyCA scale, which is a recently introduced composite measurement for Multiple System Atrophy.

data.title: Bitcoin Taps $78,000, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin Rise As Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire
data.description: Bitcoin soared to over $78,000 following President Trump's decision to extend the Iran ceasefire. Liquidations totaled $246.08 million within the last day, with Bitcoin ETFs receiving $11.8 million in net inflows on Tuesday. Additionally, Ethereum ETFs witnessed $43.4 million in net inflows. The current cryptocurrency prices are as follows: Bitcoin standing at $78,159.65, Ethereum at $2,393.33, Solana at $88.23, XRP at $1.45, Dogecoin at $0.09806, and Shiba Inu at $0.056236. The meme coin market capitalization remained stable with a slight 0.2% increase to $37.6 billion over the past 24 hours. Trader observations and further details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Banyan Group Releases 2025 Sustainability Report, Marking 20 Years of Reporting and 100-Property Milestone
data.description: The Banyan Tree Holdings Group has unveiled their latest strategic plan, marking a significant milestone with their inaugural double materiality assessment. This report also introduces three novel Impact Pathways, showcasing the company's dedication to expanding sustainability initiatives. The Group's commitment extends to amplifying sustainability efforts with the same rigor and focus as their core business operations. The announcement was made in Singapore on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Dr. Electric Explains What Colorado Springs Homeowners Should Check Before Summer Electrical Demand Peaks
data.description: In Colorado Springs, an electrical company has disclosed the panel and wiring challenges that arise in the summer months in the Pikes Peak region. The surge in demand during summer in Colorado Springs strains residential electrical systems. The area experienced a particularly high load on April 22, 2026, as reported by PRNewswire.

data.title: Earth Day Milestone: 2 Million Trees Planted as AnswerConnect Shows the Power of Corporate Climate Action
data.description: AnswerConnect's dedication to reforestation exemplifies how companies can make a significant environmental and social impact. Based in Portland, Oregon, the company revealed on Earth Day 2026 that its One Tree One...

data.title: Pioneering Education and Workforce Investors Close $450 Million Fund to Tackle AI-Driven Labor Market Disruption
data.description: Achieve Partners' most recent fund, supported by renowned investors Cambridge Associates, JP Morgan Asset Management, and Prudential, has surpassed expectations in developing apprenticeship programs for industries facing talent shortages. The fund announcement was made on April 22, 2026, in New York, marking a significant milestone in Achieve Partners' continued success.

data.title: Alfa Laval AB (publ) Interim report 1 January - 31 March 2026
data.description: In Lund, Sweden, as of April 22, 2026, an order intake of SEK 17.6 billion was recorded, showing a 1 percent decline compared to the previous period. The organic growth in orders was 6 percent. Net sales also saw a decrease of 3 percent, amounting to SEK 15.9 billion, with an organic growth of 2 percent. Adjusted EBITA experienced a decline, with further details on the decrease.

data.title: Arclin's Kevlar®, Kevlar® EXO™, and Nomex® Production Facility in Richmond Achieves ISCC PLUS Certification
data.description: In Alpharetta, Georgia, on April 22, 2026, a global materials science company named Arclin revealed that its Kevlar®, Kevlar® EXO™, and Nomex® manufacturing facilities located at the Spruance plant in Richmond have obtained certification from the International Sustainability organization. The certification recognizes the plant's commitment to sustainable practices in their production processes.

data.title: The Broe Group Commences Second Phase of $225 Million Cherry Creek North Development
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield has been chosen to manage the marketing of the 250 Clayton Project in Denver. Broe Real Estate Group (BREG), a Colorado-based investment firm with a significant portfolio, has selected Cushman & Wakefield for this project. The second phase of the Cherry Creek development is worth $225 million.

data.title: OpsGuru Signs Strategic Collaboration Agreement with Amazon Web Services
data.description: OpsGuru, a top AWS Premier Tier Services Partner, revealed on April 22, 2026 that they have inked a key strategic collaboration agreement (SCA) with Amazon Web Services (AWS). This move solidifies their status as the primary cloud and AI partner for companies across various scales.

data.title: DENARIUS METALS ANNOUNCES FIRST QUARTER 2026 PRODUCTION RESULTS FOR ITS ZANCUDO PROJECT IN COLOMBIA
data.description: In Toronto on April 22, 2026, Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) shared production data for the early phase of operations at its Zancudo Project in Colombia for Q1 2026. The company disclosed key information regarding the output during this period.

data.title: ServiceForge plants two million trees worldwide
data.description: ServiceForge, a company based in Portland, Oregon, commemorates a significant achievement in its continuous effort to create a lasting influence in communities worldwide. The company, known for its 24/7 live answering and customer service platform tailored for skilled trades and home service industries, reached a milestone on April 22, 2026.

data.title: Contractor Commerce launches AI-powered conversational buying experience
data.description: Cutting-edge technology is revolutionizing the e-commerce landscape for home service contracting firms in Lebanon. On April 22, 2026, Contractor Commerce revealed their latest innovation, a bespoke e-commerce and sales support system tailored for these contractors. This platform is set to transform the industry, offering advanced solutions to streamline operations and drive sales. This development signifies a significant milestone for the sector, showcasing the potential for growth and enhanced efficiency.

data.title: CRITEO TO ANNOUNCE FIRST QUARTER 2026 FINANCIAL RESULTS ON MAY 6, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, Criteo S.A. (NASDAQ: CRTO), a leading global commerce intelligence platform, disclosed that it will release its financial outcomes for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026, on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. This announcement will be made by Michael Komasinski, the Chief Executive Officer, alongside Sarah.
